description: Set legal standards and issuance rules (EPA Part 75; CCA; LEED/BREEAM)
Produce sensing/hardware and low-carbon products (ABB/Siemens; BURN; Holcim/Nucor)
Manage projects generating the data (Climate Impact Partners; Key Carbon; Hines)
Physical source where the event occurs and data is born (gensets; stoves; batch plants)
Verify sensor/device accuracy (RATA stack testers; Iceed; material labs)
Record raw operational data (SCADA; Nexleaf/IoT; Autodesk/Procore BIM)
Convert readings to CO2e via lifecycle math (LCA practitioners; Climate Focus; One Click LCA)
Independent third-party verification (TUV SUD; Gold Standard VVBs; UL Solutions)
Attach integrity/co-benefit tags (ICVCM; SDG Impact; EPD issuers)
Issue serialized credits and hold the registry (Verra; Gold Standard; EC3)
Grade credit quality/risk (BeZero; Sylvera; USGBC ratings)
Marketplaces where assets trade (Patch/Xpansiv; Carbon Exchange; green procurement)
Purchase credits/assets to meet mandates (Microsoft/Disney; outcome buyers; REITs)
ESG disclosure and outcome reporting (Watershed/Persefoni; ESG Dive; GRESB/GRI)
National/local referees enforcing claims (IRS/EPA; Ministry of Energy; building depts)
Terminal sink where credits are retired and cannot be reused (lifecycle finality)
